action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Joers, Stroud, Emerson, DeSmidt, Anderson, Andraca, Billings, Brown, Hong, Madison, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sinicki, Tenorio and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Hesselbein, Smith, Drake, Carpenter, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys and Spreitzer
